title: Inplace mod of an `AtomicInt64` by zero causes arithmetic exception
author: devdanzin
body:
Running the code below raises `SIGFPE`:

```python
import cereggii

target_atomic_int = cereggii.AtomicInt64(1)
target_atomic_int.__imod__(0)
```

Backtrace:
```
Program received signal SIGFPE, Arithmetic exception.
0x00007ffff42d2d04 in AtomicInt64_InplaceRemainder_internal (self=0x7fffb29c4750, other=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>, do_refcount=1) at /home/danzin/projects/cereggii/src/cereggii/atomic_int.c:851
851             desired = current % amount;

#0  0x00007ffff42d2d04 in AtomicInt64_InplaceRemainder_internal (self=0x7fffb29c4750, other=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>, do_refcount=1)
    at /home/danzin/projects/cereggii/src/cereggii/atomic_int.c:851
#1  0x000055555594fe11 in binary_iop1 (v=v@entry=0x7fffb29c4750, w=w@entry=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>, iop_slot=iop_slot@entry=176,
    op_slot=op_slot@entry=24, op_name=op_name@entry=0x5555561e7a60 "%=") at Objects/abstract.c:1228
#2  0x000055555594ffa0 in binary_iop (v=v@entry=0x7fffb29c4750, w=w@entry=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>, iop_slot=iop_slot@entry=176,
    op_slot=op_slot@entry=24, op_name=op_name@entry=0x5555561e7a60 "%=") at Objects/abstract.c:1253
#3  0x00005555559545b5 in PyNumber_InPlaceRemainder (v=v@entry=0x7fffb29c4750, w=w@entry=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>)
    at Objects/abstract.c:1294
#4  0x0000555555d94fa5 in _PyEval_EvalFrameDefault (tstate=tstate@entry=0x5555567c3a40 <_PyRuntime+362752>, frame=0x529000005280,
    frame@entry=0x529000005220, throwflag=throwflag@entry=0) at Python/generated_cases.c.h:62
#5  0x0000555555e09002 in _PyEval_EvalFrame (throwflag=0, frame=0x529000005220, tstate=0x5555567c3a40 <_PyRuntime+362752>)
    at ./Include/internal/pycore_ceval.h:121
#6  _PyEval_Vector (tstate=tstate@entry=0x5555567c3a40 <_PyRuntime+362752>, func=func@entry=0x7fffb29bf350, locals=locals@entry=0x7fffb270cbb0,
    args=args@entry=0x0, argcount=argcount@entry=0, kwnames=kwnames@entry=0x0) at Python/ceval.c:1965
#7  0x0000555555e095ec in PyEval_EvalCode (co=co@entry=0x7fffb28d1050, globals=globals@entry=0x7fffb270cbb0, locals=<optimized out>,
    locals@entry=0x7fffb270cbb0) at Python/ceval.c:857
```
